sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (day_number Int64, converted_date String);
INSERT INTO test_dates (day_number, converted_date) VALUES (58849, fromModifiedJulianDay(58849));
UPDATE test_dates SET converted_date = fromModifiedJulianDay(60000) WHERE day_number = 1;
SELECT day_number, converted_date FROM test_dates WHERE day_number BETWEEN 58800 AND 58850;
